baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare it against a no-skill baseline or previous-version snapshot using the same prompt and inputs.

evals.prompt: Merge docs/a.pdf and docs/b.pdf into one PDF and confirm the output is valid.
evals.expected_output: A merged PDF written to a new path, with original files preserved and page count or openability validated.
assertions: Uses a PDF-appropriate library or CLI.
Writes to a new output path.
Validates the output page count or readability.
